ddls:
CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of machine (e.g., classic, modern, theme-based) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the machine was released */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the machine is placed */,
  "machine_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the machine */,
  "machine_image" TEXT /* URL or path to an image of the machine */,
  "machine_video" TEXT /* URL or path to a video of the machine's gameplay */,
  "machine_status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine being tracked */,
  "average_score" INTEGER /* Average score achieved on the machine */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved on the machine */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved on the machine */,
  "plays" INTEGER /* Number of times the machine has been played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_performance_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine being played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player on the machine */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the player played the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine being tracked */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the score */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player on the machine */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the tournament is held */,
  "tournament_prize" TEXT /* Prize amount or description for the tournament */,
  "tournament_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the tournament */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player in the tournament */,
  "participant_date" TEXT /* Date the player participated in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the tournament */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player in the tournament */,
  "standing_date" TEXT /* Date the player achieved their standing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_standings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_standings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, administrator, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., cleaning, repair) */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_maintenance_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine being tracked */,
  "earning_date" TEXT /* Date the earnings were generated */,
  "earning_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of earnings generated */,
  "earning_type" TEXT /* Type of earnings (e.g., coins, tickets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_earnings_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)
